falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a confirmed market top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug pattern) on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking and holding this resistance level would invalidate the pattern's bearish implications, proving the current call wrong.

falsification_conditions.condition: The market enters a confirmed bull phase (new all-time high with >20% volume increase vs. previous month)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bull market confirmation would directly contradict the 'HOLD' signal and UNKNOWN phase designation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
